texto: As your faith is strengthened, you will find that there is no longer the need to have a sense of control, that things will flow as they will and that you will flow with them to your great delight and benefit.
explicacao: Citação de Emmanuel Teney sobre temas ligados a fe. “As your faith is strengthened, you will find that there is no longer the need to have a sense of …” articula fe, faith, flow em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como flow.
